perf_hint: the panel is a fraction of the frame and each pixel reads the spectrum four times, so `bars` is among the cheapest presets at any `bar_count` — on software rendering the resolution is what costs, and `--sample` previews at 720p for exactly that reason

params.name: anchor
params.description: Which of the nine grid positions the panel sits in, the text card's vocabulary.

params.name: width
params.description: The panel's width, as a fraction of the frame's width.

params.name: height
params.description: The panel's height, as a fraction of the frame's height.

params.name: margin
params.description: The gap between the panel and the frame's edges, as a fraction of the short edge.

params.name: bar_count
params.description: How many bars divide the spectrum, bass at the left edge and air at the right.

params.name: gap
params.description: How much of each bar's pitch is empty space between neighbours.

params.name: glow
params.description: How brightly a bar's tip halos upward into the unlit part of its column.

params.name: brightness
params.description: How much light the panel puts out overall.
